title: Integrated Roadside Sensing and V2X for VRU Safety at Intersections
summary: A new framework combines multi-modal sensors, edge analytics, and V2X/P2X communication in a single cabinet to protect vulnerable road users at signalized intersections, addressing a critical gap in current systems.

title: FreqKD: Frequency-Decoupled Knowledge Distillation for IR Object Detection
summary: A new approach, FreqKD, tackles the challenge of transferring knowledge from RGB to infrared imagery for object detection. It decouples knowledge distillation by spatial frequency, recognizing varying alignment across low and high-frequency components.

title: Dash2Sim: Dashcam to Driving Simulation Framework
summary: A new framework, Dash2Sim, converts everyday dashcam videos into detailed 4D driving logs, enabling simulations to incorporate a far broader range of real-world scenarios, including rare events.

title: PersonaDrive Improves Human-Style Driving Simulation Performance
summary: The PersonaDrive pipeline improves closed-loop driving simulations by integrating human-style behavior, enhancing agent performance across driving styles.

title: West U Secures Federal Funding for Safety Plan
summary: West University has secured federal funding to enhance pedestrian safety measures in the area, aiming to reduce accidents and improve community safety.

title: Portland's New Pedestrian Safety Initiative
summary: Portland has introduced a new initiative aimed at enhancing pedestrian safety throughout the city. This program includes various strategies to reduce accidents and improve walkability.
